heading: Standardized air quality modeling
label: 7620 Standardized air quality modeling
notes: Amendments1988—Subsec. (b). substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “National Bureau of Standards”.Pub. L. 100–418

Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise expressly provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1977 Amendment note under .Aug. 7, 1977section 406(d) of Pub. L. 95–95section 7401 of this title
amendments: Amendments1988—Subsec. (b). substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “National Bureau of Standards”.Pub. L. 100–418

Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise expressly provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1977 Amendment note under .Aug. 7, 1977section 406(d) of Pub. L. 95–95section 7401 of this title

children.heading: Conferences
children.label: a Conferences
children.text: Not later than six months after , and at least every three years thereafter, the Administrator shall conduct a conference on air quality modeling. In conducting such conference, special attention shall be given to appropriate modeling necessary for carrying out part C of subchapter I (relating to prevention of significant deterioration of air quality).August 7, 1977

children.heading: Conferees
children.label: b Conferees
children.text: The conference conducted under this section shall provide for participation by the National Academy of Sciences, representatives of State and local air pollution control agencies, and appropriate Federal agencies, including the National Science Foundation; the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, and the National Institute of Standards and Technology.1So in original. The semicolon probably should be a comma.1

children.heading: Comments; transcripts
children.label: c Comments; transcripts
children.text: Interested persons shall be permitted to submit written comments and a verbatim transcript of the conference proceedings shall be maintained.

children.heading: Promulgation and revision of regulations relating to air quality modeling
children.label: d Promulgation and revision of regulations relating to air quality modeling
children.text: The comments submitted and the transcript maintained pursuant to subsection (c) shall be included in the docket required to be established for purposes of promulgating or revising any regulation relating to air quality modeling under part C of subchapter I.
